title: PackNeverLucky
description: realistic / medieval / progression based modpack for modded MC.
body:
Performance
This modpack is faster than competing game clients, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.


Feels familiar
This modpack includes features that allow you to experience Minecraft just as you remember it, no matter what version you've used before. This means you can use game controllers, play local worlds with friends, view advancements in a large window, and much more.

Up to date
This modpack receives fast updates and stands as one of the first modpacks to upgrade to newer Minecraft versions. Updating the modpack is easy and will preserve your mod settings, where possible.

Built on Fabric
This modpack uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack as a base to add your favorite mods to.
